{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322201508868EC92E645D2858D14E"}"},"total":24},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7541437198834320153","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"大家好，很高兴可以收获大家的友好评价。这是一本关于美食的书，适合吃饭的时候听。整体还不错的呢。另外，作者已经开了一本新书，也是关于美食的。如果你也喜欢作者笔下的美食，那么新书也可以看看哦。感恩！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755882500,"group_id":"7491179634269096984","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"感谢喜欢，感谢支持！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N35Tix/NcVHgU9qIpOZLPX7Yf+jbV4Ytfm+IMeGovxKb","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/eef8227421384a97af63855af17cc07d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705048&x-signature=bsXojAha7868B4RXojMUzG8r3GM%3D","user_id":"3492475362621159","user_name":"万千红"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3492475362621159","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7491179634269096984","book_info":{"abstract":"【美食+摆摊+系统+烹饪常识+日常＋无CP+治愈+下饭】
王真996猝死后，意外穿越异世界，并获得了美食系统。
每半个月换一个随机摆摊地点。
顾客找不到王真，建了几百个食客群，只要王真一出摊，就来蹲点。
“我排了一个小时的队，你告诉我，卖完了？”
“我就晚了几分钟过来，怎么队伍就排这么长了？”
“为什么今天没出摊？”
“卧槽，卖小龙虾的老板呢？”
后面这些食客都发现，不同地方摆摊的老板竟然都是王老板！！！
食客又是蹲点又是排长队，只为吃上王老板亲手做的美食……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o8efa6407bdcd1f5d109c9f17758d39cd~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"万千红","author_id":"","book_id":"7491179634269096984","book_name":"美食街头摆摊：食客爆满追着买","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7491179642276037144","read_count":"739","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"241192"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"115","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,发家致富,系统,穿越,美食","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5786fd40faa3152fb19b10d4c23af659~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365708&x-signature=PPOxDR9teAeSnfXPtK0HoMm84JU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3492475362621159","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322201508868EC92E645D2858D14E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count"
